zh.lifeSummary: 當Beatrijs Hugosdr van Naaldwijk於大約1240年出生在荷蘭努-拉藍德維爾森時，她的父親Hugo II van Naaldwijk27歲，母親Isabelle Aelbrechtsdr van Velsen19歲。她於1255年與Floris van Doortoghe van Brederode結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她去世於1259年享年20歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Beatrijs Hugosdr van Naaldwijk于大约1240年出生在荷兰努-拉藍德維爾森时，她的父亲Hugo II van Naaldwijk27岁，母亲Isabelle Aelbrechtsdr van Velsen19岁。她于1255年与Floris van Doortoghe van Brederode结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。她去世于1259年享年20岁。

nameMeanings.name: van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

en.lifeSummary: When Beatrijs Hugosdr van Naaldwijk was born about 1240, in Velsen, North Holland, Netherlands, her father, Hugo II van Naaldwijk, was 27 and her mother, Isabelle Aelbrechtsdr van Velsen, was 19. She married Floris van Doortoghe van Brederode in 1255. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died in 1259, at the age of 20.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Beatrijs Hugosdr van Naaldwijk est née environ 1240, à Velsen, Hollande-septentrionale, Pays-Bas, son père, Hugo II van Naaldwijk, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Isabelle Aelbrechtsdr van Velsen, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Floris van Doortoghe van Brederode en 1255. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Elle est décédée en 1259, à l’âge de 20 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Beatrijs Hugosdr van Naaldwijk um 1240 in Velsen, Nord-Holland, Niederlande geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hugo II van Naaldwijk 27 und ihre Mutter Isabelle Aelbrechtsdr van Velsen 19. Sie hat 1255 Floris van Doortoghe van Brederode geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb 1259 im Alter von 20 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Beatrijs Hugosdr van Naaldwijk è nata il circa 1240 nel Velsen, Noord-Holland, Paesi Bassi, sua padre, Hugo II van Naaldwijk, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Isabelle Aelbrechtsdr van Velsen, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato Floris van Doortoghe van Brederode nel 1255. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì nel 1259, all'età di 20 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Beatrijs Hugosdr van Naaldwijkが約1240年にオランダノオルド-hオランドベルセンで生まれた時，父Hugo II van Naaldwijkは27歳，母Isabelle Aelbrechtsdr van Velsenは19歳であった。1255年にFloris van Doortoghe van Brederodeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼女は1259年に20歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Beatrijs Hugosdr van Naaldwijk(이)가 대략 1240년 네덜란드 노르드-홀랜드 벨센에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugo II van Naaldwijk(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabelle Aelbrechtsdr van Velsen(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 1255년 Floris van Doortoghe van Brederode(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1259년 20세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Beatrijs Hugosdr van Naaldwijk nasceu aproximadamente 1240, em Velsen, Holanda do Norte, Países Baixos, seu pai, Hugo II van Naaldwijk, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Isabelle Aelbrechtsdr van Velsen, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com Floris van Doortoghe van Brederode em 1255. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1259, com 20 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Beatrijs Hugosdr van Naaldwijk родилась около 1240 г. в местности велсен, нурд-холланд, Нидерланды, её отцу по имени Hugo II van Naaldwijk было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabelle Aelbrechtsdr van Velsen, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Floris van Doortoghe van Brederode в 1255 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она умерла в 1259 г. в возрасте 20 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Beatrijs Hugosdr van Naaldwijk nació aproximadamente 1240, en Velsen, Noord-Holland, Países Bajos, su papá, Hugo II van Naaldwijk, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Isabelle Aelbrechtsdr van Velsen, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Floris van Doortoghe van Brederode en 1255. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió en 1259, a la edad de 20 años.
